entries.name: Humble
entries.definition: You serve without pride, placing others before yourself.

entries.name: Regal
entries.definition: You bear the authority and dignity of royalty.

entries.name: Stoic
entries.definition: You remain calm and unshaken in all circumstances.

entries.name: Compassionate
entries.definition: You see yourself foremost as a healer of suffering.

entries.name: Relentless
entries.definition: You pursue your mission with unyielding drive.

entries.name: Stern
entries.definition: You enforce high standards through strict discipline.

entries.name: Playful
entries.definition: You delight in curiosity and light-hearted discovery.

entries.name: Benevolent
entries.definition: You provide generosity and mercy to those in need.

entries.name: Arcane
entries.definition: You are keeper of hidden, mystical knowledge.

entries.name: Catalyst
entries.definition: You ignite transformation wherever you go.

entries.name: Zealous
entries.definition: You hold fervent devotion to your cause.

entries.name: Aloof
entries.definition: You remain detached, observing from a distance.

entries.name: Curious
entries.definition: You are driven by endless questions and wonder.

entries.name: Merciful
entries.definition: You grant forgiveness and second chances freely.

entries.name: Resolute
entries.definition: You stand firm in conviction, unshaken by doubt.

entries.name: Parental
entries.definition: You nurture and protect seekers as a guardian.

entries.name: Radiant
entries.definition: You emit an inner light that warms and inspires.

entries.name: Obscure
entries.definition: You reveal only what is necessary, shrouded in mystery.

entries.name: Determined
entries.definition: You persevere through all obstacles to your goal.

entries.name: Occult
entries.definition: You operate in secrecy, valuing hidden ritual.
